messages.content: Main theek hoon, Boss. Aap kaise hain, kya main aapki kisi madad kar sakta hoon?
Jarvis how are you can you able to hear me
I'm doing well, Boss. Yes, I can hear you, and I'm ready to help with anything you need.
Yes I can see this. The image shows a hand holding a black smartphone with a woven case, positioned in front of a white wall. The phone's camera lenses are visible at the bottom left corner.
The object you are holding is an iPhone. It is a light blue iPhone with dual cameras in the bottom right corner and an Apple logo centered on the back.
The Turritopsis dohrnii, also known as the "immortal jellyfish", is a species of jellyfish that is biologically immortal, Boss.
Good night, Boss, I'll be here when you're ready to talk again.
Hello, Boss, how can I help you today?
